title: Waku
excerpt: description: Create a Waku application and deploy it to Cloudflare Workers with Workers Assets. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this guide, you will create a new [Waku ↗](https://waku.gg/) application and deploy to Cloudflare Workers (with the new [Workers Assets](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/static-assets/)). Waku is a minimal React framework built for [React 19 ↗](https://react.dev/blog/2024/12/05/react-19) and [React Server Components ↗](https://react.dev/reference/rsc/server-components). The use of Server Components is completely optional.…
